# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Apr 3, 2026)
## OVERVIEW 
The day's activity focused on expanding the plugin registry with two new additions, indicating a push towards broadening the available functionalities within the ElizaOS ecosystem.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
Two new pull requests were opened today, both aiming to add new plugins to the registry:
*   [#331](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/331) proposes the addition of the `@madeonsol/plugin-madeonsol` plugin.
*   [#330](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/330) proposes the addition of the `@elizaos/plugin-swapapi` plugin.
